zone_specs:
Building footprint: 15.00 m (W, x-axis) × 8.00 m (D, y-axis). Two floors. F1: z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, z_top=3.00. F2: z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, z_top=6.60. All zones are rectangular, derived from the plan wall network. World origin = SW corner of footprint at ground.

=== F1 ZONES (7 total, matches testdata thermal_zones=7) ===

Zone F1_NW (role: office): x_range [0.00, 4.90], y_range [5.00, 8.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Top-left perimeter office; north + west walls are exterior; south wall faces corridor; east wall faces F1_NM.

Zone F1_NM (role: office): x_range [4.90, 10.10], y_range [5.00, 8.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Top-middle perimeter office; north wall exterior; south wall faces corridor; east wall faces F1_NE; west wall faces F1_NW.

Zone F1_NE (role: office): x_range [10.10, 15.00], y_range [5.00, 8.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Top-right perimeter office; north + east walls exterior; south wall faces corridor; west wall faces F1_NM.

Zone F1_Corridor (role: corridor): x_range [0.00, 15.00], y_range [3.00, 5.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Full-width central corridor strip spanning the building east-west; east + west ends are exterior; north wall faces F1_NW / F1_NM / F1_NE (three segments); south wall faces F1_SW / F1_SM / F1_SE (three segments).

Zone F1_SW (role: office): x_range [0.00, 4.90], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Bottom-left perimeter office; south + west walls exterior; north wall faces corridor; east wall faces F1_SM.

Zone F1_SM (role: office): x_range [4.90, 10.10], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Bottom-middle perimeter office; south wall exterior; north wall faces corridor; east wall faces F1_SE; west wall faces F1_SW.

Zone F1_SE (role: office): x_range [10.10, 15.00], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 0.00, ceiling_height 3.00. Bottom-right perimeter office; south + east walls exterior; north wall faces corridor; west wall faces F1_SM.

=== F2 ZONES (7 total, matches testdata thermal_zones=7) ===

Zone F2_NW (role: meeting room): x_range [0.00, 7.50], y_range [5.00, 8.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Top-left meeting room; north + west walls exterior; south wall faces corridor; east wall faces F2_NE.

Zone F2_NE (role: meeting room): x_range [7.50, 15.00], y_range [5.00, 8.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Top-right meeting room; north + east walls exterior; south wall faces corridor; west wall faces F2_NW.

Zone F2_Corridor (role: corridor): x_range [0.00, 15.00], y_range [3.00, 5.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Full-width central corridor; east + west ends exterior; north wall faces F2_NW / F2_NE; south wall faces F2_SW1 / F2_SW2 / F2_SE1 / F2_SE2.

Zone F2_SW1 (role: office): x_range [0.00, 4.95], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Bottom-left office; south + west walls exterior; north wall faces corridor; east wall faces F2_SW2.

Zone F2_SW2 (role: office): x_range [4.95, 7.50], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Bottom office 2; south wall exterior; north wall faces corridor; east wall faces F2_SE1; west wall faces F2_SW1.

Zone F2_SE1 (role: office): x_range [7.50, 10.05], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Bottom office 3; south wall exterior; north wall faces corridor; east wall faces F2_SE2; west wall faces F2_SW2.

Zone F2_SE2 (role: office): x_range [10.05, 15.00], y_range [0.00, 3.00], z_floor 3.00, ceiling_height 3.60. Bottom-right office; south + east walls exterior; north wall faces corridor; west wall faces F2_SE1.

=== COVERAGE CHECK ===
F1: union of zone footprints = full 15.00×8.00, no overlaps, no unexplained voids. Corridor is one zone spanning full width.
F2: union of zone footprints = full 15.00×8.00, no overlaps, no unexplained voids.

=== NOTE ON PARTITION COORDINATES ===
F2 partitions at x=4.95 and x=10.05 are estimates from phase 1 plan dim-chain interpretation. South elevation windows at x=4.11-5.31 and x=9.69-10.89 cross these estimated boundaries; windows are split at the partition lines (see fenestration_specs). F1 partition at x=4.90 has a similar crossing with the South facade short window S7 (x=4.64-5.84); split at x=4.90.
material_specs:
All materials use standard ASHRAE 90.1 lightweight office construction properties. Thickness in metres, conductivity in W/(m·K), density in kg/m³, specific heat in J/(kg·K).

=== OPAQUE MATERIALS ===

Mat_ExtWall_Stucco: Roughness=Medium, Thickness=0.025, Conductivity=0.692, Density=1858, SpecificHeat=837.

Mat_ExtWall_Insulation: Roughness=Medium, Thickness=0.050, Conductivity=0.043, Density=91, SpecificHeat=837.

Mat_ExtWall_Gypsum: Roughness=MediumSmooth, Thickness=0.013, Conductivity=0.160, Density=800, SpecificHeat=1090.

Mat_IntWall_Gypsum: Roughness=MediumSmooth, Thickness=0.013, Conductivity=0.160, Density=800, SpecificHeat=1090.

Mat_Floor_Concrete: Roughness=MediumRough, Thickness=0.150, Conductivity=1.400, Density=2240, SpecificHeat=840.

Mat_GroundFloor_Carpet: Roughness=MediumSmooth, Thickness=0.010, Conductivity=0.060, Density=288, SpecificHeat=1380.

Mat_Roof_Membrane: Roughness=MediumSmooth, Thickness=0.010, Conductivity=0.160, Density=1120, SpecificHeat=1460.

Mat_Roof_Insulation: Roughness=Medium, Thickness=0.100, Conductivity=0.043, Density=91, SpecificHeat=837.

Mat_Roof_Deck: Roughness=MediumRough, Thickness=0.020, Conductivity=0.140, Density=530, SpecificHeat=900.

=== GLAZING MATERIAL (WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem) ===

Mat_Glazing_DoubleLowE: UFactor=1.80, SolarHeatGainCoefficient=0.35, VisibleTransmittance=0.60.
schedule_specs:
All schedules use Schedule:Compact format with Through/For/Until syntax. Schedule type limits are created for each schedule.

Schedule Sched_Thermo_Heat: ScheduleTypeLimits=Temperature, values: Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 15.0, Until 09:00 21.0, Until 18:00 21.0, Until 24:00 18.0, For Weekends Holidays, Until 24:00 15.0.

Schedule Sched_Thermo_Cool: ScheduleTypeLimits=Temperature, values: Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 30.0, Until 09:00 24.0, Until 18:00 24.0, Until 24:00 28.0, For Weekends Holidays, Until 24:00 30.0.

Schedule Sched_HVAC_Avail: ScheduleTypeLimits=OnOff, values: Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 06:00 0, Until 20:00 1, Until 24:00 0, For Weekends Holidays, Until 24:00 0.

Schedule Sched_Occupancy: ScheduleTypeLimits=Fraction, values: Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 08:00 0.0, Until 09:00 0.3, Until 12:00 0.9, Until 13:00 0.3, Until 17:00 0.9, Until 18:00 0.3, Until 24:00 0.0, For Weekends Holidays, Until 24:00 0.0.

Schedule Sched_Activity: ScheduleTypeLimits=ActivityLevel, values: Through 12/31, For AllDays, Until 24:00 120. (Units W/person; 120 W = seated office work.)

Schedule Sched_Lights: ScheduleTypeLimits=Fraction, values: Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 08:00 0.1, Until 09:00 0.5, Until 12:00 1.0, Until 13:00 0.8, Until 17:00 1.0, Until 18:00 0.5, Until 24:00 0.1, For Weekends Holidays, Until 24:00 0.05.
construction_specs:
=== CONSTRUCTION NAMES AND LAYER STACKS ===

Default_Ext_Wall: layers = [Mat_ExtWall_Stucco, Mat_ExtWall_Insulation, Mat_ExtWall_Gypsum]. Used for all exterior walls.

Default_Int_Wall: layers = [Mat_IntWall_Gypsum]. Used for all interior walls (partitions dividing two zones). Single symmetric layer so reverse is trivially equal.

Default_Window: layers = [Mat_Glazing_DoubleLowE]. Must be a standalone Construction referencing only the glazing material; do not add an air gap or second glass pane (EP fatal if SimpleGlazingSystem is stacked). Used for all windows.

Default_GroundFloor: layers = [Mat_GroundFloor_Carpet, Mat_Floor_Concrete]. Used for F1 floor (Ground boundary).

Default_Roof: layers = [Mat_Roof_Membrane, Mat_Roof_Insulation, Mat_Roof_Deck]. Used for F2 ceiling / roof (Outdoors boundary).

Cons_InterFloor: layers = [Mat_Floor_Concrete, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum]. SINGLE shared construction applied to BOTH the upper zone's floor surface AND the lower zone's ceiling surface for every InterZone floor/ceiling pair. Using one construction on both sides satisfies EP's reverse-symmetry requirement trivially. Applies to all F1-ceiling/F2-floor pairs; no Default_Floor or Default_Ceiling constructions exist.
surface_specs:
World coordinate system: origin SW corner (0,0,0), x east, y north, z up. All vertices CCW from outside per the zonetool convention. All coordinates in metres to two decimals. Every surface explicitly listed; no template writing.

=== CROSS-FLOOR SPLIT-PAIRING SUMMARY ===
F1_NM_Ceiling_W (x 4.90-7.50) ↔ F2_NW_Floor_E (x 4.90-7.50) : Cons_InterFloor
F1_NM_Ceiling_E (x 7.50-10.10) ↔ F2_NE_Floor_W (x 7.50-10.10) : Cons_InterFloor
F1_SM_Ceiling_W (x 4.90-4.95) ↔ F2_SW1_Floor_E (x 4.90-4.95) : Cons_InterFloor
F1_SM_Ceiling_E (x 4.95-10.10) covers: F2_SW2_Floor (x 4.95-7.50) + F2_SE1_Floor (x 7.50-10.05) + gap to 10.10 is not paired — F2_SW2_Floor and F2_SE1_Floor are each one undivided surface pairing with the corresponding portion of F1_SM_Ceiling. Since F2_SW2 (4.95-7.50) and F2_SE1 (7.50-10.05) are both subsets of F1_SM (4.90-10.10), each F2 zone floor pairs with F1_SM ceiling directly without further ceiling-side subdivision beyond the two pieces already enumerated.
F1_SE_Ceiling (x 10.10-15.00 split at 10.05): Sub-surface x=10.10-15.00 ↔ F2_SE2_Floor (x=10.05-15.00) with overlapping region 10.10-15.00. The small sliver 10.05-10.10 of F1_SE ceiling is not covered by any F2 zone (F2_SE1 ends at 10.05, F2_SE2 starts at 10.05 with gap 10.05-10.10 vs F1_SE which starts at 10.10). This 0.05m misalignment is a tracing tolerance issue; the effective overlap 10.10-15.00 pairs F1_SE_Ceiling with F2_SE2_Floor (Cons_InterFloor).

All other F1-ceiling / F2-floor pairings are 1:1 same-footprint (F1_NW↔F2_NW part, F1_NE↔F2_NE, F1_Corridor↔F2_Corridor, F1_SW↔F2_SW1 part, etc.) and use Cons_InterFloor.
fenestration_specs:
All window vertices CCW from outside using the §4.1 table. Absolute world z values come from the elevation dimension chains. Parent surface must be the exterior wall surface of the host zone. Windows that cross estimated zone partition boundaries are split at the partition line into two separate fenestration records.

hvac_specs:
HVAC type: IdealLoadsAirSystem for every zone. One IdealLoadsAirSystem per zone, named IdealLoads_{ZoneName}. All systems use:
- Availability schedule: Sched_HVAC_Avail
- Heating setpoint schedule: Sched_Thermo_Heat
- Cooling setpoint schedule: Sched_Thermo_Cool
- Maximum heating supply air temperature: 50°C
- Minimum cooling supply air temperature: 13°C
- Maximum sensible heating capacity: autosize
- Maximum total cooling capacity: autosize
- Outdoor air method: none (no mechanical ventilation)
- Dehumidification control type: ConstantSensibleHeatRatio
- Humidification control type: None
- Heat recovery: None

Thermostat placed in each zone referencing the same setpoint schedules.

Zone list (14 zones total): F1_NW, F1_NM, F1_NE, F1_Corridor, F1_SW, F1_SM, F1_SE, F2_NW, F2_NE, F2_Corridor, F2_SW1, F2_SW2, F2_SE1, F2_SE2.
people_specs:
Occupancy density: 10 m²/person (0.10 person/m²) for all office/meeting zones; 5 m²/person for corridor zones (transient occupancy).

People schedule: Sched_Occupancy (fraction of peak).
Activity schedule: Sched_Activity (120 W/person seated office work).

Per-zone assignments:
F1_NW: floor_area=4.90×3.00=14.70m², peak occupancy=1 person (14.70/10=1.47, rounded down to 1), schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_NM: floor_area=5.20×3.00=15.60m², peak occupancy=1 person (15.60/10=1.56→1), schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_NE: floor_area=4.90×3.00=14.70m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_Corridor: floor_area=15.00×2.00=30.00m², peak occupancy=6 person (30/5=6), schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_SW: floor_area=4.90×3.00=14.70m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_SM: floor_area=5.20×3.00=15.60m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F1_SE: floor_area=4.90×3.00=14.70m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.

F2_NW: floor_area=7.50×3.00=22.50m², peak occupancy=2 persons (meeting room), schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_NE: floor_area=7.50×3.00=22.50m², peak occupancy=2 persons, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_Corridor: floor_area=15.00×2.00=30.00m², peak occupancy=6 persons, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_SW1: floor_area=4.95×3.00=14.85m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_SW2: floor_area=2.55×3.00=7.65m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_SE1: floor_area=2.55×3.00=7.65m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
F2_SE2: floor_area=4.95×3.00=14.85m², peak occupancy=1 person, schedule Sched_Occupancy, activity Sched_Activity.
